title: Passive Voice — Present and Past
description: BE + past participle shifts focus from who does the action to what happens.
summary_pt_br: Passiva: BE + particípio. Foco no resultado, não em quem faz. 'The tacos are cooked.'

scenes.subtitle_en: BE + past participle shifts focus from who does the action to what happens.
scenes.subtitle_pt: Passiva: BE + particípio. Foco no resultado, não em quem faz. 'The tacos are cooked.'

scenes.text_en: BE + past participle shifts focus from who does the action to what happens. Today's focus: passive voice — present and past. The bread is baked fresh every morning.
scenes.text_pt: Passiva: BE + particípio. Foco no resultado, não em quem faz. 'The tacos are cooked.' Foco de hoje: passive voice — present and past. O pão é assado fresquinho toda manhã.

scenes.title: Passive Voice — Present and Past
scenes.body_en: Active: 'Chefs cook the tacos.' Passive: 'The tacos ARE COOKED by chefs.' Use passive when the doer is unknown, obvious, or unimportant.
scenes.body_pt: Passiva: BE + particípio. Foco no resultado, não em quem faz. 'The tacos are cooked.'

examples.en: The bread is baked fresh every morning.
examples.pt: O pão é assado fresquinho toda manhã.

examples.en: The menu was updated last week.
examples.pt: O cardápio foi atualizado semana passada.

examples.en: Our tacos are loved by everyone in town.
examples.pt: Nossos tacos são amados por todos.

scenes.title: Key vocabulary — Passive Voice — Present and Past

exercise.question: Complete: "The bread is baked fresh every ___."
exercise.explanation: Full sentence: "The bread is baked fresh every morning."
exercise.hint_pt_br: O pão é assado fresquinho toda manhã.

exercise.question: Which sentence is correct?
options: I haven't heard anything about that.
The menu was updated last week.
exercise.explanation: The correct sentence is: "The menu was updated last week."
exercise.hint_pt_br: O cardápio foi atualizado semana passada.

exercise.explanation: Five key terms from the lesson. Match each English word to its Portuguese meaning.

scenes.title: Passive Voice — Present and Past — dialog
scenes.pt_summary: Diálogo sobre passive voice — present and past. Pratique as frases marcadas.

turns.speaker: ai
turns.text: Welcome to Tropical Bites. Tell me about how the food is made here.

turns.speaker: user
turns.target: All the bread is baked fresh every morning.

turns.speaker: ai
turns.text: And the sauces? Are they made in-house too?

turns.speaker: user
turns.target: Yes, our sauces are prepared by my mother.

turns.speaker: ai
turns.text: I heard the menu was updated recently. What's new?

turns.speaker: user
turns.target: Three vegetarian options were added last month.

turns.speaker: user
turns.target: Most vegetables are bought from the market nearby.

turns.speaker: ai
turns.text: How is the food delivered to customers?

turns.speaker: user
turns.target: Orders are picked up or delivered by bike.

turns.speaker: ai
turns.text: Fresh, local, and sustainable. I'm impressed.

scenes.title: A tour of Tropical Bites
scenes.pt_summary: Ouça com atenção. Depois, escreva em inglês o que entendeu — resumo, detalhes e sua opinião. O professor vai ler e comentar.
scenes.prompt_en: Write how the food is made at Rafa's truck, step by step. Use at least three passive sentences.
scenes.prompt_pt: Escreva em inglês o que ouviu. Resumo curto com quem falou, o que disseram e sua opinião.

paragraphs.speaker: Narrator
paragraphs.en: Every morning at Tropical Bites, the kitchen comes alive before the sun rises over the coast.

paragraphs.speaker: Rafa
paragraphs.en: The bread is baked by five in the morning, and the sauces are prepared by my mother.

paragraphs.speaker: Assistant
paragraphs.en: The vegetables are bought at the local market and delivered by nine.

paragraphs.speaker: Rafa
paragraphs.en: By noon, over two hundred tacos are served to hungry customers.

paragraphs.speaker: Customer
paragraphs.en: The food here is prepared with real love. You can taste the difference.

paragraphs.speaker: Narrator
paragraphs.en: A small truck, a family team, and a menu written by dedication itself.

scenes.title: Recap reading
scenes.passage_en: At Amazing School, the class just finished "Passive Voice — Present and Past". BE + past participle shifts focus from who does the action to what happens. The bread is baked fresh every morning. The menu was updated last week. Mr. Kumar reminded the students that practice is the key — listen, read aloud, write your own examples. Every small step adds up.

check.question: According to Mr. Kumar, what is the key to learning?
check.explanation: Practice — listen, read aloud, write your own examples.
check.hint_pt_br: Prática: ouvir, ler em voz alta, escrever exemplos.

scenes.title: Listen to Bia
scenes.audio_text_en: Hello! I'm Bia, from Praia do Sol. Today in class we studied "Passive Voice — Present and Past". I liked it because it was clear and useful. See you next time!

check.question: What did Bia study today?
options: A grammar rule from last year
check.explanation: She says: "Passive Voice — Present and Past".
check.hint_pt_br: Ela fala o título: "Passive Voice — Present and Past".

scenes.title: Go deeper — free resources
scenes.body_pt: Fontes gratuitas e confiáveis para continuar praticando. Salve os links e volte sempre.
